The controller at uploads_controller.rb line 65 calls `OptimizedImage.downsize(tempfile.path, tempfile.path, \"80%\", allow_animation: ...)` with 3 positional args, which will match the second definition and work, but the first definition becomes dead code. This is a code smell indicating a merge conflict or refactoring error that breaks maintainability and correctness.",
